name: Section 125 Cafeteria Plan Exclusions

eligibility.description: Requires a written plan where all participants are employees and offers a choice between at least one taxable benefit (cash) and one qualified nontaxable benefit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows employees to choose between cash and qualified benefits (like health insurance or HSAs) without including the value of those benefits in gross income.
